title: Senior Investment Banker at Yes Bank Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Yes Bank Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Yes Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
